name: atelier

scripts.db:types: supabase gen types typescript --project-id diaxxsxytqpzrbtgyqho > src/lib/types/database.generated.ts

//browserslist: Target modern evergreen browsers only. Drops ~14 KiB of polyfills for ES2020+ features (Array.prototype.at/flat/flatMap, Object.fromEntries, Object.hasOwn, String.prototype.trim{Start,End}) that have been natively available in every shipped browser for 4+ years. Atelier is an internal agency tool used by Saunders staff + their talent/crew on current devices — there's no IE 11 / iOS <14 / Android Chrome <90 user to support. Lighthouse flagged the wasted bytes; this is the fix.
